core_idea: Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Heathcliff is a Support — damage scales with the number of debuff types on the target. Stack varied statuses before committing high-value skills. Scaling conditions: +10% per negative effect type (max +30%). Support passive (**Dark Cloud Blade**) buffs your **fastest Speed ally** — pair with a high-Speed attacker and keep this unit alive on field.
playstyle_guide:
- **Dark Cloud Blade** amplifies the **fastest Speed ally** — slot a quick damage dealer and avoid stagger so their hits keep the bonus.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: +10% per negative effect type (max +30%).
- Stack several distinct status types on the target before using high-power skills — each debuff type adds to damage.

**S1 — Lenticular Rend** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Bleed stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).

**S2 — Stormcloud** (BP 4, CP +6, x2): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Bleed stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Inflict 2 Bleed; [Heads Hit] Inflict 1 Slash Fragility
- Inflict +2 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Inflict 1 Attack Power Down (once per turn)

**S3 — Thundercleave** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average / High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Bleed stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Inflict 2 Bleed; [On Hit] The final Coin deals +10% damage
- Inflict 1 Slash Fragility; [On Hit] The final Coin deals +10% damage
- Each debuff type on the target adds +10% damage (up to +30%) — stack statuses broadly.

Combat passive — **Battle Ready**: When a ally dies, gain 1 Slash Power Up for this Encounter.
  - When 3+ Kurokumo Clan allies are defeated, gain Battle Ready for this Encounter.

Combat passive — **Impale**: 1 ally with the fastest Speed: against enemies that used Defense Skills or were at max HP before attacking this turn: deal +10% damage.

Defense skill — **Counter: Rules of the Backstreets**: [Clashable Counter].
  - If Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael is on the field, activate the following:.
  - Convert all Coins in this Skill into Unbreakable Coins.
  - Final Power +4 to this Skill upon Clash Lose.
team_suggestions: Fits into any team that can spread varied status types — each distinct debuff on the target adds to damage output. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available. The support passive also benefits teammates directly — consider this identity even in compositions where it is not the primary damage dealer.
- **Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael**: 'Gathering Dark Clouds' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū**: '@#$'s Hand I Let Slip' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **Shi Assoc. East Section 3 Faust**: 'Aiming for the Bullseye' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
